_comment: Currency-watch config (Area 1). Lists every stored authoritative REGISTRY/field-catalog in the ecosystem, where its authority lives (to re-verify a drift), and how to check it (sha256 baseline). tools/registry_currency.py hashes each, compares to tools/registry-baselines.json, and reports drift + the source to re-verify on. Education-standards crawling lives in standards-updater (tools/standards_refresh.py); this watches the OTHER registries + the plugin manifest. Human-approve every change, then --update-baselines.

registries.note: re-verify which native connectors exist + what districts restrict; states/evidence types may change
cross-link: deep crawl is standards-updater's job; this flags the source list itself drifting
must list every shipped skill + artifact type
routes must resolve to real skills (see shared/health/)

registries.authority: SIS + state field catalogs (course levels, enrollment statuses, assessment types)
registries.note: enum/field catalogs evolve with SIS/state reporting

registries.authority: Cowork plugin marketplace + the installed skill set
registries.note: bump version + refresh marketplace.json when skills are added/removed
capability manifest; re-verify pins/providers; auto-update via dependabot, scan via security_scan.py

registries.authority: installed skills/engines + the release VERSION/plugin version
registries.note: consistency checked by tools/version.py --check; rollback target registry (tools/rollback.py)

registries.authority: the watched authoritative web sources (CPALMS/FLDOE/FL Legislature)
registries.note: external source list for tools/source_currency.py; this watches the list itself drifting, source_currency watches the live sources

registries.authority: FLDOE MSID + OCPS School Choice (the sources behind the schools index)
registries.note: external source list for the OCPS schools index; source_currency watches the live sources

registries.authority: FLDOE MSID (school list/status) + OCPS School Choice (magnet/choice programs)
registries.note: public non-PII school+program index; schools open/close regularly — verify against MSID, re-baseline

registries.authority: the feed self-update catalog (L7); curated by the seed-curator (L8, tools/seed_curator.py)
registries.note: watches the feeds catalog file itself drifting; source_currency/seed_curator watch the live feeds. Catalog changes are logged to ledger/feeds-change-log.json
